timelineItems.title: Nootle
timelineItems.description: Nootle is a lightweight macOS meeting recorder with live transcription, speaker diarization, AI summarization, and meeting detection. Made to work with AI chats and Claude Code. Built with Tauri, Rust, React, and ONNX Runtime.

timelineItems.title: Terrarium
timelineItems.description: A tiny terrarium to view your TSX & JSX components. Lightweight Mac app built with Tauri & Rust.

timelineItems.title: Michelle Mayes
timelineItems.description: Personal website for Michelle Mayes built with Astro and deployed on Vercel.

timelineItems.title: Heb Grocery Agent
timelineItems.description: A Chrome extension that automates your HEB grocery shopping. Simply paste your grocery list, and the extension will search for items and add them to your cart on HEB.com.

timelineItems.title: Vibe Tooling
timelineItems.description: A Claude Code plugin marketplace for code quality tools.

timelineItems.title: AnimaMac
timelineItems.description: A native macOS GIF recorder inspired by Gifox. Record your screen to high-quality GIFs with no time limits.

timelineItems.title: Morning Byte
timelineItems.description: Morning Byte aggregates the best tech content from Hacker News, Reddit, Lobsters, Dev.to, and your favorite RSS feeds, then packages it into a beautifully formatted EPUB that's automatically delivered to your Kindle each morning.

timelineItems.title: Evoloop
timelineItems.description: Autonomous landing page optimization engine that uses AI to generate, test, and evolve high-converting page variants using Thompson Sampling.

timelineItems.title: Logseq Ai Chat
timelineItems.description: An Electron desktop application that provides an AI chat interface integrated with Logseq. Chat with and update your notes using multiple LLM providers (Groq, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Ollama) with automatic context retrieval from your Logseq knowledge graph.

timelineItems.title: Logseq Assistant
timelineItems.description: This utility polls an Outlook mailbox for messages assigned to a specific category, generates an AI summary, and uploads the result as a Markdown file to Google Drive to update a Logseq graph.

timelineItems.title: Datespark
timelineItems.description: A smart date planning app that helps you discover and save unique date ideas based on your location, preferences, and budget. This is a reimagining of my DateRandomizer.

timelineItems.title: Austin Terrain Web
timelineItems.description: A Next.js web application that generates downloadable 3D terrain models from Austin-area aerial imagery and elevation data.
